ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "venue_state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "venue_seats" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "venue_zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the venue */,
  "venue_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the venue */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the venue */,
  "venue_opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the venue */,
  "venue_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the venue */,
  "venue_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the venue (including standing room) */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, sports) */,
  "max_attendance" INTEGER /* Maximum expected attendance for the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, canceled, postponed) */,
  "event_price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the event tickets */,
  "event_promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code for discounted tickets */,
  "event_venue_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the venue for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which the ticket is sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who purchased the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets purchased */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "ticket_price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the ticket */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, sold, refunded) */,
  "ticket_row" TEXT /* Row number or section for the ticket */,
  "ticket_seat" TEXT /* Seat number for the ticket */,
  "ticket_promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used for the ticket purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., venue manager, event organizer, ticket purchaser) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "user_state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "user_zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the booking */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "booking_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "booking_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Concert, Sports) */,
  "event_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket purchased */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., Wi-Fi, Parking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the amenity (if applicable) */,
  "amenity_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the amenity (e.g., always, upon request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue managed by this manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "manager_address" TEXT /* Address of the manager */,
  "manager_city" TEXT /* City where the manager is located */,
  "manager_state" TEXT /* State where the manager is located */,
  "manager_zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the manager */,
  "manager_status" TEXT /* Status of the manager (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_managers_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attended the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the event attended */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., attended, did not attend) */,
  "attendance_check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the user checked in for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
